title: Unrestricted filesystem traversal via projectPath parameter in MCP tools
description: MCP tools accept arbitrary projectPath with no validation, no allowlist, and no sandboxing.
remediation: Validate projectPath against an allowlist of permitted base directories.

title: SSRF via unvalidated URL parameter in scan-headers tool
description: scan-headers makes HTTP requests to arbitrary URLs with no validation, enabling SSRF.
remediation: Validate URL: reject private IP ranges, localhost, and non-HTTP(S) schemes.

title: Command injection risk via execFile in query-kb (Python subprocess)
description: query-kb passes user-controlled query to Python subprocess with limited sanitization.
remediation: Sanitize query string. Pass arguments via stdin instead of command-line.

title: Arbitrary command execution via git hooks in scan-secrets
description: scan-secrets runs git log on arbitrary projectPath; malicious repos can exploit git hooks.
remediation: Set GIT_CONFIG_NOSYSTEM=1 and GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 in execFile environment.

title: Excessive agency — MCP tools grant unrestricted filesystem read access
description: 6 MCP tools perform sensitive operations without human confirmation or capability restrictions.
remediation: Implement tool-level access controls and allowed base paths.

title: No rate limiting or recursion guard on MCP tool invocations
description: No rate limiting, concurrency controls, or recursion guards on tool invocations.
remediation: Add rate limiting (max 10/min). Set upper bound for maxFiles in deep mode.

title: ReDoS risk from KB regex patterns
description: scan-project compiles KB regex patterns with no catastrophic backtracking check.
remediation: Use safe-regex library or RE2 for guaranteed linear-time matching.

title: System prompt and detection patterns exposed in readable markdown files
description: Agent instructions and regex patterns in plaintext .md files can be used to craft evasion.
remediation: Use external tools (semgrep, trivy) as second layer. Keep sensitive logic in compiled code.

title: RAG poisoning vector via KB manipulation
description: RAG indexer reads all KB JSON files with no integrity verification before indexing.
remediation: Add checksum verification for KB files before indexing.

title: CLAUDE.md can be manipulated to alter audit behavior
description: CLAUDE.md contains auto-followed instructions; write access enables behavior manipulation.
remediation: Review CLAUDE.md changes carefully. Add hash verification for modifications.

title: External tool install scripts download and execute from internet
description: install-tools.sh pipes remote scripts to sh without hash verification.
remediation: Pin tool versions and verify checksums before execution.

title: Skill orchestrator dispatches agents without output size limits
description: No limits on agent response size or findings count, risking context overflow.
remediation: Add max findings count per agent (100) and total (500).

title: Error messages may leak internal paths and configuration details
description: MCP tool error handlers include internal paths and stderr in responses.
remediation: Return generic error messages; log details internally.
